title: Power Integrations (POWI) Q2 2024 Earnings Results Preview
text: Power Integrations Q2 2024 earnings call held on August 6, 2024. The company reported quarterly earnings of $0.28 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.26 per share, though this compared to earnings of $0.36 per share a year ago. Revenue guidance for Q2 was provided in the range of $105 million plus or minus $5 million, representing a seasonal increase of 15% at the midpoint from Q1. The earnings call highlighted strong industrial demand continuing to offset weakness in consumer appliances. Management's commentary focused on managing through near-term demand softness while positioning for longer-term growth opportunities in automotive EVs and data center power solutions. The company's competitive position in GaN technology continues to strengthen, with multiple design wins across key end markets. Capital allocation priorities included maintaining dividend payments and share repurchases while investing in R&D for next-generation products.
